word: G4287 - προθέσμιος - prothésmios - proth-es'-mee-os - Time appointed

sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
set beforehand, appointed determined beforehand, pre - arranged
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G4253 and a derivative of G5087; fixed beforehand, that is, (feminine with G2250 implied) a designated day: - time appointed.
